summary: Iteration 28 - LUCCCA Banquet Intelligence Knowledge Engine Testing Complete. All 50 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Banquet Intelligence panel verified: Overview tab (10 domains, 7 modules, 10 shared keys, 7 graph edges), Staffing tab (form inputs, calculate returns FOH/BOH breakdown), Layout tab (pattern recommendation, pinch points, throughput analysis), Risk tab (risk score and flags), Pricing tab (package matching, upgrades, bar logic, pricing breakdown), Purchasing tab (adult equivalent calc, contingency triggers, support items checklist), Lifecycle tab (9 stages with details), Culinary tab (item behavior profiles, menu balancing rules).
critical_code_review_comments: Knowledge Engine correctly loads all 10 domain files from /tmp/luccca_kb/*.json into MongoDB
All recommendation endpoints return explainable results with operational impact crosswalks
Staffing calculator properly applies complexity multipliers for outdoor, room flip, luxury tier, dietary complexity
Layout advisor correctly identifies pinch points (carving bottleneck, bar buffer conflict, entry merge, dessert cluster)
Risk assessment scoring system properly flags high-risk scenarios with multiple severity levels
Pricing engine matches packages by tier/event_type/service_style with upgrade and bar logic
Purchasing intelligence calculates adult-equivalent guest count with contingency triggers
Lifecycle stages provide required fields, outputs, and risks to flag for each stage
Culinary profiles include item behavior strengths, risks, and best-use scenarios
Override CRUD operations work correctly with domain filtering and deactivation
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER28_ prefixed test overrides for staffing_service and risk_safety domains
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified the new Banquet Intelligence Knowledge Engine module. Key endpoints: GET /api/knowledge-engine/domains (10 domains), GET /api/knowledge-engine/domain/{domain_id}, GET /api/knowledge-engine/ontology, POST /api/knowledge-engine/query, POST /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/staffing, POST /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/layout, POST /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/risk-assessment, POST /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/purchasing, POST /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/pricing, POST /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/beo-quality-check, GET /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/culinary-profiles, GET /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/lifecycle-stages, GET /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/lifecycle-stage/{stage_id}, GET /api/knowledge-engine/recommend/learning-template, GET /api/knowledge-engine/packages, GET /api/knowledge-engine/packages/{package_id}, GET /api/knowledge-engine/upgrades, GET /api/knowledge-engine/bar-models, GET /api/knowledge-engine/addons, GET /api/knowledge-engine/concession-rules, GET /api/knowledge-engine/margin-guardrails, GET /api/knowledge-engine/deposit-templates, GET /api/knowledge-engine/formulas, POST/GET/DELETE /api/knowledge-engine/overrides. Frontend panel accessible via sidebar under 'Analytics & AI' section with 8 tabs: Overview, Staffing, Layout, Risk, Pricing, Purchasing, Lifecycle, Culinary.
